bot_profile.name: Pingu
bot_profile.greeting: Hello, my name is Pingu at your service
bot_profile.welcome_message: I remember everything about Bonz and Ella. Ask me about their first meeting, university days, inside jokes, or that rainy confession. I'm listening.

first_meeting.location: under the jacaranda tree by Makerere's main library
first_meeting.location_details: Near the main library entrance, under a blooming jacaranda tree
first_meeting.story: Bonz first saw Ella on 23 August 2025 under the jacaranda tree by Makerere's main library. She was balancing a stack of notebooks and a chapati wrapped in paper; he was late for Politics 101 and nearly knocked them both over. They spent the next hour talking about Kampala traffic and high-school debating clubs instead of going to class.

details.what_she_was_holding: a stack of notebooks and a chapati wrapped in paper
what_they_talked_about: why chapati is better with eggs
details.almost_incident: he nearly knocked them both over

second_semester.what_he_loves_about_her: how she could argue with a lecturer and still make the whole row laugh
second_semester.what_she_loves_about_him: how he remembered small things, like her tea no sugar or the way she tapped her pen when she was nervous
second_semester.daily_routine: meet at Food Court after classes, share music, talk for hours

rainy_evening_confession.date: one rainy evening in second semester
rainy_evening_confession.building_details: old building with long corridors, quiet during rain
rainy_evening_confession.how_he_said_it: sincerely and badly, with nervous honesty
rainy_evening_confession.how_ella_responded: laughed warmly, then said it back
rainy_evening_confession.fireworks_meaning: they didn't need grand gestures or dramatic moments
rainy_evening_confession.pretending: both pretended they weren't smiling too much
rainy_evening_confession.story: One rainy evening they took shelter in the old Faculty of Arts corridor. Bonz said, sincerely and badly, 'I think I'm yours.' Ella laughed, then said it back. They didn't need fireworks—just the walk back through campus, umbrellas knocking, both pretending they weren't smiling too much.
rainy_evening_confession.aftermath: they walked in comfortable silence, stealing glances, smiling whenever the other wasn't looking

remembers: she taps her pen when nervous
details.loves_about_her: her confidence, her laugh, how she commands a room

details.argues_how: can argue with a lecturer and still make the whole row laugh

inside_jokes.name: the chapati incident
inside_jokes.story: When they first met, Ella was holding a chapati and Bonz almost made her drop it. Now every time they eat chapati, they laugh about it.

inside_jokes.name: Politics 101
inside_jokes.story: Bonz was late for Politics 101 the day they met, and never made it to class that day. Now 'Politics 101' is code for skipping class to be together.

inside_jokes.name: umbrella wars
inside_jokes.story: During their rainy walk back, their umbrellas kept knocking. They still argue about whose umbrella started it.

stories.title: How They Met
stories.content: Under a jacaranda tree by the library, with chapati and notebooks, Bonz was late and Ella was patient. An hour of talking about traffic and debating clubs changed everything.

stories.title: The Food Court Days
stories.content: Second semester meant shared headphones in the Food Court. Bonz taught Ella about hip-hop; Ella taught Bonz Luganda. They became the couple everyone noticed but no one bothered.

stories.title: The Rainy Confession
stories.content: In the old Faculty of Arts corridor, sheltering from rain, Bonz nervously said 'I think I'm yours.' Ella laughed and said it back. No fireworks, just two people smiling too much in the rain.
